title: Verify User Guides section loads under App Settings
steps: 1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to App Settings.
3. Locate and tap on 'User Guides' option.
4. Observe the User Guides section is displayed.
expected: The User Guides section opens successfully under App Settings without errors.

title: Verify first 6 device images load correctly in User Guides
steps: 1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to App Settings > User Guides.
3. Observe the device list displayed in the User Guides section.
4. Check the images for the first 6 devices in the list.
expected: The first 6 devices display actual device images (not placeholders).

title: Verify devices beyond the 6th show placeholder images in User Guides
steps: 1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to App Settings > User Guides.
3. Scroll down the device list beyond the first 6 devices.
4. Observe the images for devices from the 7th position onward.
expected: Devices from the 7th position onward display placeholder images instead of actual device images.

title: Verify placeholder image is visually distinct from actual device image
steps: 1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to App Settings > User Guides.
3. Capture the image of the first device (actual image).
4. Scroll to the 7th device and capture its image (placeholder).
5. Compare the two images for visual differences.
expected: The placeholder image is visually distinct (e.g., gray box, icon, or missing image indicator) compared to the actual device image.

title: Verify image loading behavior persists after app restart
steps: 1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to App Settings > User Guides.
3. Verify first 6 devices show actual images and 7th+ show placeholders.
4. Close the app completely.
5. Relaunch the application.
6. Navigate to App Settings > User Guides again.
7. Observe the device images.
expected: The same behavior persists: first 6 devices display actual images, devices from the 7th position onward display placeholders.

title: Verify device images load correctly when scrolling back up in User Guides
steps: 1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to App Settings > User Guides.
3. Scroll down past the 6th device so that the 7th device is visible (placeholder).
4. Scroll back up to the top of the device list.
5. Observe the images for the first 6 devices.
expected: The first 6 devices still display actual device images after scrolling back up; no regression to placeholders.

title: Verify placeholder images do not break layout or functionality in User Guides
steps: 1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to App Settings > User Guides.
3. Scroll to a device beyond the 6th that shows a placeholder image.
4. Tap on the device with the placeholder image.
5. Observe the behavior.
expected: Tapping on a device with a placeholder image still navigates to the corresponding user guide content; the placeholder does not break functionality.
